summary: Matched the two remaining Yoshi SpecialHi functions in ftYs_SpecialHi.c by reshaping a stick-magnitude clamp, removing an unnecessary PAD_STACK, and introducing a scoped float temporary to reuse the egg throw frame counter value.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; edits affected ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C and fn_8012E110.

what_changed.change: Replaced `mag = MAX(temp, 1.0f) * da->xF0` with explicit assignment, cap branch `if (mag > 1.0f) { mag = 1.0f; }`, then multiplication by `da->xF0`.
Removed `PAD_STACK(4)` before `Vec3 sp30` to restore the target stack slot layout described by the PR body.
Introduced a scoped `float x4 = fp->mv.ys.specialhi.x4;` temporary and reused it for both arguments to `it_802B28C8`.

smart_moves.text: The author documented the specific codegen reason for each small source change: branch shape for the clamp, single float conversion/reuse for `x4`, and stack slot restoration after removing `PAD_STACK(4)`.
The PR kept the match focused to one fighter translation unit and reported narrow verification for `ftYs_SpecialHi` reaching 14/14 functions and 1836/1836 code bytes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a macro expression such as `MAX` does not produce the target branch shape for a capped value, an explicit `if` cap can be the better source hypothesis, but the exact comparison direction and behavior must be verified.
For call arguments that use the same float value more than once, introducing a scoped temporary may match codegen by converting once and reusing the result.
PAD_STACK should be removed when it is no longer justified and shifts a local stack object away from the target slot.

naming_conventions.name: x4
naming_conventions.context: Scoped local copy of `fp->mv.ys.specialhi.x4` used for `it_802B28C8` arguments.
naming_conventions.convention: The PR used the existing field-style name `x4` for a narrow temporary rather than inventing a semantic name for the frame counter.

naming_conventions.name: sp30, sp24, sp18
naming_conventions.convention: Existing stack-slot-style local names were retained; the PR did not attempt semantic renames.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace a compact macro expression with explicit control flow when the target needs a specific branch shape.
Use a scoped temporary to force one float conversion and reuse the converted value across multiple call arguments.
Remove stale `PAD_STACK(4)` when it causes an incorrect stack offset for a following local.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report listed 2 new matches in `main/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialHi`: `fn_8012E110` and `ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C`, with matched code increasing by 740 bytes overall.

follow_up_queries: ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C MAX temp 1.0 explicit if mag > 1.0
it_802B28C8 x4 float temporary double conversion
Yoshi SpecialHi egg throw frame counter x4

notes: PR body gives explicit rationale and verification commands.
Diff directly supports all described code changes.
Bot report independently records two new matches, but no human review comments were present.
The intake does not independently rerun verification; match and regression results are recorded as PR-authored/bot evidence only.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Explicit clamp branch can beat MAX macro for matching branch shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2452, `ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C` matched after replacing `MAX(temp, 1.0f)` with an explicit `if (mag > 1.0f) { mag = 1.0f; }` cap, because the macro expression did not match target control flow.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped float temp reused across call args can match single conversion
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2452, `fn_8012E110` matched after introducing a scoped `float x4` temporary for `fp->mv.ys.specialhi.x4`, so the value was converted once and reused in the `it_802B28C8` call.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Remove unjustified PAD_STACK when it moves locals off target offsets
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2452, removing `PAD_STACK(4)` before the first `Vec3` in `fn_8012E110` restored the target stack layout described as `r1+0x30` instead of `r1+0x34`.

source_update_candidates.title: Mention explicit cap branches as a control-flow alternative to MIN/MAX macros
source_update_candidates.text: Consider extending `canonical-control-flow-and-macros` with a caution that project macros such as MAX/MIN should not be forced when an explicit branch is the verified target shape for a cap or clamp.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides a concrete case where replacing `MAX` with explicit `if` control flow closed a match.

source_update_candidates.title: Document scoped temporaries for avoiding duplicate float conversions
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a narrow matching tactic note that a scoped temporary can be appropriate when objdiff evidence shows the target converts a value once and reuses it across call arguments.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR explicitly attributes the `fn_8012E110` match to converting `x4` once and reusing the value.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize from this PR that `MAX` is usually wrong for clamps; the evidence only supports this Yoshi SpecialHi target branch-shape case.
Do not treat `x4` as a semantic naming convention beyond this local field-derived temporary.
No reviewer intent or human review feedback was available; only PR body, diff, and bot issue comment were loaded.
